_comment: Panel-certified footage-primary journeys (CURIOSITY_BRAIN §7.5 v9). Each 'beats' list feeds scripts/footage_preview.py. ss/seconds are tuned to clean, real-footage windows (no NASA slates, no title cards, no black leader). Lesson from the panel: ONE coherent journey (causally connected shots) passes; a scale-montage of unrelated shots (rocket->earth->sun) FAILS as auto-assembled. Match dissolve brightness (a blown-out shot into a dark starfield sparkles). End on the peak, not a decrescendo.

leaving_earth.verdict: UNANIMOUS PASS x2 (v5 crescendo cut: viewer 88 / editor PASS / adversarial 80; earlier v4 pull-out cut also passed 88/76/80). Zero critical failures either way. Panel note: end on the peak (v5) not a decrescendo (v4).

beats._note: liftoff; ENDS 27.3 before the black leader at 27.4
cosmic reveal MIDDLE: Milky Way + airglow limb + stars
crescendo FINISH: push into bright green-airglow + dense city lights (strongest frame last)

leaving_earth._known_soft_spot: the launch->orbit dissolve frame (~3s) is dark/near-empty because the liftoff beat ends approaching the black leader; not a critical failure but the thinnest composition. Fixable by starting the orbit beat on a brighter frame or shortening xfade.
